General.Name: Urban Edge Properties
General.Description: Urban Edge Properties is a NYSE listed real estate investment trust focused on owning, managing, acquiring, developing, and redeveloping retail real estate. Specifically in urban communities, primarily in the Washington, D.C. to Boston corridor. Urban Edge owns 73 properties totaling 17.2 million square feet of gross leasable area.
General.Address: 12 East 49th Street, New York, NY, United States, 10017
